allow_once.title: Allow [[key]] once every [[duration]] [[duration_unit]]
allow_once.hint: Checks whether the cooldown is active, atomically activates it if allowed, and returns true to continue the Flow or false to stop it.

reset_cooldown.title: Reset cooldown for [[key]]
reset_cooldown.hint: Clears the cooldown for the selected key so it can trigger again immediately.

suspend_cooldown.title: Suspend cooldown for [[key]]
suspend_cooldown.hint: Registers the cooldown as if it just ran, blocking further triggers until the duration defined in the Allow condition has elapsed.
